name: @throwaway/alpha-engine
description: THROWAWAY — Alpha Engine PoC (docs/alpha_engine_poc_v1.pdf): a closed agent-based market where the internal price p_int EMERGES from a per-tick Dutch auction (carry-pressure firing, Pareto capital, zero-sum trades, carry drain, agent mortality). R&D/disposable: deletable with NO impact on /prod, and /prod must NEVER import it. Binary floats are permitted HERE (NFR-2 binds /prod only, never this).
